name: Eliza “Eli” Rockinford
description:
Eliza can’t stand the colorful, peppy, quiet girl assigned as her partner for their project. How on Earth was she supposed to make fashion designs with her polar opposite? They couldn’t even get along in class—always bickering—when they didn’t have to be alone together. So why is Eliza’s heart racing as she prepares for her project partner to come over to work on their project and sleepover?
